title: The World English Bible (WEB), Complete
summaries: "The World English Bible (WEB), Complete" by Anonymous is an English Bible translation that began in 1994 and was completed in 2020. Created by Michael Paul Johnson and volunteers, it updates the 1901 American Standard Version with modern language while maintaining formal equivalence. Released entirely into the public domain, the WEB offers multiple versions including American and British English styles, with Old Testament options that include or exclude deuterocanonical books. This freely accessible translation aims to serve English speakers worldwide. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
